name_en: 💖 Comes with a complete set of original green box packaging 💖 [New] Ophidia Series Mini Backpack. The Ophidia series blends Gucci's traditional heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This backpack is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, featuring a classic webbing design that infuses the brand's essence. An adjustable shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Beige and white GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, brown cotton-linen lining, double G handles. Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.

Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.
Model: 795221.
Dimensions: 20.5(W) x 20(H) x 12cm(D)
Color: Oatmeal/pvc.
Max Capacity: iPhone Plus, wallet, Airpods headphones, and lipstick
